project_dir.description: Absolute path of the project directory the agent should `cd` into.

backend.description: Backend identifier — must match one of the names in [`ServerCapabilities::adapters`].

args.description: Extra args appended to the adapter's base command.

prompt.description: Initial prompt to push to stdin after the first prompt loop is ready. Omit to leave the session waiting for human input.

worktree.description: If true, create a fresh git worktree for this session (post-M1; M0 daemon may ignore).
